commercialRule: Every installed Inventra app already knows the Supabase project URL and public publishable key, so the user only signs in with email/password or Google and the same email pulls the same workspace.
releaseNotes: Fixed the previous 10.3.3 patch packaging error: ReferenceError ext is not defined.
Embeds the Supabase project URL and public publishable key into the app build.
Normalizes the Supabase URL to the base project URL, not the /rest/v1 endpoint.
Writes .env, .env.local, and .env.production so installer builds include the same Supabase config.
Sets Supabase config in localStorage automatically on startup, focus, and online events.
Fixes second-PC error: Supabase is not configured.
No SQL is run automatically by this patch.
No local app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater logic is deleted.
